jktekxZ vf/kfu;e] 1956 ¼1956 dk 48½ dh /kkjk 7 }kjk iznRr 'kfDr;ksa dk iz;ksx djrs gq,] dsUnzh; ljdkj ,rn~}kjk dk-vk- 2723¼v½] rkjh[k 17-08-2016 }kjk izdkf’kr vf/klwpuk esa fuEufyf[kr la’kks/ku djrh gS% vf/klwpuk ds fgUnh laLdj.k ds i`"B la[;k 2 ij iSjk 3 ds varxZr lkj.kh ¼LraEHk&3½ esa lM+d dh led{k yEckbZ ¼fd-eh- esa½ ds fy, mYysf[kr vad “0-805 fd-eh-” dks “8-050 fd-eh-” i<+k tk,xkA [Qk la- Hkkjkjkizk@lhvks@2016&17@thlh&vkxjk ckbikl la’kks/ku ¼0-000&32-800½] nf{krk nkl] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 21st September, 2016 S.O. 3011(E).—Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 published vide G.S.R. 838(E) dated 5th December, 2008 and amended from time to time, the Central Government, vide notification S.O. 2723(E) dated 17.08.2016 authorized National Highways Authority of India to collect, either through its officials or through a contractor, fee for use of the Four lane Bypass to Agra City (having Design Chainage km 0.000 to km 32.800) taking off at km 176.800 of NH-2 (km 0.000 of bypass) and merging at km 13.030 of NH-3 (km 32.800 of the bypass) in the State of Uttar Pradesh. -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules 2008 and amended from time to time, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the Notification published vide S.O. 2723(E), dated 17.08.2016: In Hindi version of the Notification for the equivalent road length (in km) mentioned in the Table (Column 3) under Para 3 on Page-2, the figure “0.805 km” shall be read as “8.050 km”. [F. No. NHAI/CO/2016-17/GC-Agra Bypass Amendment (0.000-32.800)] DAKSHITA DAS, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
